About

Hi, I'm Lily.

I do nails out of Akron — everything from everyday classics to custom, hand-painted designs you won't find anywhere else.

Powerpuff Girls, Stitch, or a clean set for a wedding — bring me the idea. I can come to you, or we set up a time. Whatever's easiest.

  • Full sets Coffin · stiletto · almond · square · any length
  • Custom & character art Hand-painted to order
  • French, solids, florals, glitter The classics, done clean
  • Pedicures Mani-pedi sets available
  • Press-on sets Made to order

Let's do your nails.

I keep it flexible — I can travel to you, or we'll set up an appointment. Book online or send a message.
